label: Data collection, curation & filtering

node.label: Data collection, curation & filtering
node.definition: Data curation collects, filters, balances, labels, documents, and governs examples so the training distribution better matches intended capabilities and risks.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Data collection, curation & filtering is to connect Datasets, sampling & splits, Databases & information retrieval to downstream capabilities including Deduplication, contamination control & provenance, Large-scale pretraining, Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules.
examples: substrate for Deduplication, contamination control & provenance
substrate for Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Databases & information retrieval.

dependencies.rationale: Data collection, curation & filtering uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Data collection, curation & filtering uses Databases & information retrieval as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Data collection, curation & filtering uses Statistics & experimental design as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
